title: Radiation Safety Officer
about: ASPL Fusion (Agnira Sanlayan Pvt. Ltd.) is an applied plasma and neutron-systems company working on accelerator-based BNCT, domestic medical-isotope production, and industrial neutron applications, within established Indian regulatory and safety frameworks. A proton-accelerator-based neutron source for BNCT and isotope production sits in the AERB Category-II classification. The Radiation Safety Officer is the lead regulatory and operational-safety role at the facility.
description: Own all radiation protection and AERB regulatory compliance at ASPL's accelerator facility. Scope includes personnel dosimetry, area monitoring, emergency response planning, waste management, and AERB Category-II licence documentation.
responsibilities: Develop and implement the facility radiation-protection programme
Manage personnel dosimetry (TLD / OSL badges), area monitoring, and contamination surveys
Prepare AERB Category-II licence applications and compliance documentation
Design shielding verification protocols for the accelerator facility
Develop emergency-response procedures for radiation incidents
Train all facility staff in radiation-safety practices
Maintain regulatory records and submit periodic reports to AERB
requirements: BARC Radiation Safety Training (1-year programme) or equivalent
3+ years RSO experience at an accelerator or reactor facility
Working knowledge of AERB regulations, safety codes, and licensing procedures
Experience with radiation-survey instruments (ion chambers, neutron dosimeters, GM counters)
preferred: Experience with neutron-facility safety specifically (vs gamma / X-ray only)
Prior involvement in AERB licensing applications from scratch
benefits: Co-authorship on ASPL publications and patent filings (the default for technical roles)
Conference travel support (ANS, IEEE NPSS, IPAC, ASTRO, IAEA technical meetings and equivalent)
Direct mentorship from Prof. Prabhat Ranjan and Prof. Y.C. Saxena, plus weekly working-group technical syncs
Founding-team scope: shape your domain end-to-end as part of a small team scaling up
Core collaboration hours 10:00–18:00 IST with flexibility outside that window
